item.title: Boosting Your Anomaly Detection With LLMs
item.description: Guide on synthetic data generation strategies and techniques for defect anomaly detection.

item.title: Exploring OpenCV Applications in 2025
item.description: Explores applications of OpenCV including industrial inspection and manufacturing use cases.

item.title: Replicating conv autoencoder for anomaly detection
item.description: Implementation details for a convolutional autoencoder to detect anomalies.

item.title: Custom object detection in the browser using TensorFlow.js
item.description: Build and deploy a custom YOLO-style object detection model in the browser using TensorFlow.js.

item.title: Deploy Custom Object Detection using Flask & Python, Step by Step
item.description: In this article, I will walk you through the steps to deploy your own custom YOLO model in localhost.

item.title: Synthetic YOLO Dataset Generator - vision - PyTorch Forums
item.description: It’s like a virtual data factory – great for augmenting real datasets or getting data for rare scenarios. I used this generator to create a dataset of 5k images for a custom object detector, and it significantly boosted my model’s accuracy.

item.title: Building a Vision Inspection CNN for an Industrial Application
item.description: In this article, we develop and code a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for a vision inspection classification task in the automotive electronics industry.
